from.description: JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) into the decoded wire message; required for `copy`/`copyNumber`.

to.description: Dotted path into the canonical `payload` this rule writes (e.g. `applicant.id`).

value.description: The literal value for a `constant` op.

optional.description: When true, a missing/undefined `from` value is allowed (the field is simply omitted); otherwise it is a mapping error.

description:
One declarative **Message-Translator rule** (doc 05 §2). Rules are evaluated in order into the
canonical `payload`; each is a pure transform of the decoded input, so the mapping's golden pairs are
stable. `from` is a JSON Pointer into the wire message (RFC 6901); `to` is a dotted canonical path.
